channel.title: Keyword Optimization on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Keyword Optimization on simeononsecurity

item.title: Module 5: Keywords and the Skills Section — Where Keywords Go and How to Find Them
item.description: Learn how to find the right keywords from any job description, where to place them in your resume for maximum ATS impact, and how to structure a skills section that recruiters can scan in 5 seconds.

item.title: Resume Optimization Course: Beat ATS Systems and Land More Interviews
item.description: A practical, no-fluff course on writing a resume that gets past ATS filters and lands interviews. Covers formatting, keywords, bullet points, cover letters, and using AI tools to optimize your chances.

item.title: Mastering Google Dorks: Unleash Effortless OSINT and Hacking Power
item.category: "SEO" , "Cybersecurity" , "Online Search" , "Google Dorks" , "Open Source Intelligence" , "Hacking Techniques" , "Digital Skills" , "Web Searching" , "Internet Security" , "Data Discovery"
item.description: Discover how to effortlessly enhance your online searches using Google Dorks, the ultimate search power tool, and find hidden treasures of information with ease. Uncover vulnerabilities, gather OSINT, and stay ahead of the game.

item.title: Mastering Google Dorks: Unleash Effortless Search Power
item.category: "SEO" , "Cybersecurity" , "Online Search" , "Google Dorks" , "Search Techniques" , "Digital Skills" , "Web Searching" , "Internet Tips" , "Online Research" , "Data Discovery"
item.description: Discover how to effortlessly enhance your online searches using Google Dorks, the ultimate search power tool, and find hidden gems of information with ease.

item.title: Expert Tips for Writing a Powerful Resume
item.category: "resume writing" , "resume tips" , "font usage" , "resume structure" , "resume types" , "chronological resume" , "functional resume" , "combination resume" , "keyword optimization" , "references on resume" , "resume statement" , "handling layoffs" , "handling gaps in resume" , "graduation year on resume" , "listing certifications" , "resume layout" , "concise resume" , "white space in resume" , "resume customization" , "professional resume"
item.description: Learn the best practices for creating an effective resume, including font usage, resume types, keyword optimization, handling gaps, and optimizing layout.
